mapper.select: SELECT alarm_feed_id AS alarmFeedId, instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, alarm_rule_id AS alarmRuleId, alarm_tracking_id AS alarmTrackingId, alarm_title AS alarmTitle, severity_level AS severityLevel, metric_type AS metricType, current_value AS currentValue, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, message, occurred_at AS occurredAt, resolved_at AS resolvedAt, is_resolved AS isResolved, is_read AS isRead, acknowledged, acknowledged_at AS acknowledgedAt FROM alarm_feed WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}

SELECT TO_CHAR(amh.recorded_at, 'HH24:00') AS hourLabel, AVG(CAST(amh.metric_value AS DECIMAL)) AS avgLatency FROM alarm_metric_history amh WHERE amh.alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId} AND amh.recorded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(amh.recorded_at, 'HH24:00') ORDER BY hourLabel

SELECT aro.object_type AS objectType, aro.object_name AS objectName, aro.metric_value AS metricValue, aro.status FROM alarm_related_objects aro WHERE aro.alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId} ORDER BY aro.metric_value DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_feed SET acknowledged = TRUE, acknowledged_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm_feed WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_feed ( alarm_rule_id, alarm_tracking_id, instance_id, database_id, alarm_title, severity_level, metric_type, current_value, threshold_value, message, occurred_at, is_resolved, is_read, acknowledged ) VALUES ( #{alarmRuleId}, #{alarmTrackingId}, #{instanceId}, #{databaseId}, #{alarmTitle}, #{severityLevel}, #{metricType}, #{currentValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{message}, #{occurredAt}, #{isResolved}, #{isRead}, #{acknowledged} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_feed SET alarm_title = #{alarmTitle}, severity_level = #{severityLevel}, current_value = #{currentValue}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, message = #{message}, occurred_at = #{occurredAt} WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}
UPDATE alarm_feed SET is_resolved = true, resolved_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_feed_id = #{alarmFeedId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_related_objects ( alarm_feed_id, alarm_rule_id, object_type, object_name, metric_value, status ) VALUES ( #{alarmFeedId}, #{alarmRuleId}, #{objectType}, #{objectName}, #{metricValue}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT alarm_feed_id FROM alarm_feed WHERE alarm_tracking_id = #{alarmTrackingId} AND is_resolved = false ORDER BY occurred_at DESC, alarm_feed_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT occurred_at FROM alarm_feed WHERE alarm_rule_id = #{alarmRuleId} AND severity_level = #{severityLevel} AND is_resolved = false ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1
